We plan to open as many as 22 new restaurants in fiscal 2024, including three to four The Cheesecake Factory restaurants
primarily driven by decreased customer traffic of 1.5% partially offset by an increase in average check of 0.9%

Average check variations are driven by menu price increases and/or changes in menu mix.
Sales through the off-premise channel comprised approximately 22% of our restaurant sales during the first quarter of fiscal 2024 as compared to 23% in the first quarter of fiscal 2023.
North Italia comparable sales increased approximately 3% from the first quarter of fiscal 2023.
Flower Child sales increased 10.2% to $34.5 million for the first quarter of fiscal 2024
We anticipate commodity inflation to be in the low - single digit range and expect labor inflation to be in the mid - single digit range.

partially offset by increased restaurant-level incentive compensation expense (0.1%)
primarily driven by a shift in sales mix (0.3%) and lower utilities (0.1%)

we anticipate total revenue for fiscal 2024 to be approximately $3.6 billion

Cash flows from operations increased by $1.7 million from the first quarter of fiscal 2023 primarily due to higher net income
Common stock dividends of $12.8 million and $13.2 million were paid in the first quarter of fiscal 2024 and 2023, respectively.

notes: Chunk has no fiscal_kpis (null); all candidates come from event text.

Reviewed both events in order. Event 2 (8-K 0001104659-24-033490, 2024-03-12) contains only the Item 5.02 header (officer departure/election/compensatory arrangements) with no substantive text -> too vague to coin a name; skipped.

Skipped as vague/instance-bound/boilerplate (8 total): the Item 5.02 8-K stub; convertible senior notes maturity/conversion-rate mechanics (informational, no causal claim); pandemic dining-restriction boilerplate; climate change (broad category); international/CPG royalty revenue streams (strategy mention, no causal claim); gift card program (strategy lever); adverse weather conditions (boilerplate, vague); armed conflicts/geopolitical conditions (broad category).

Dedup decisions within chunk: 'shift in sales mix' folded into menu_mix; 'labor inflation' folded into wage_inflation; company-wide comparable sales -> same_store_sales (Cheesecake Factory brand-level comp sales not coined separately because the brand name equals the company legal name, which is banned in names); 'permit approval delays' named as restaurant_permitting (delay = state, not name).
north_italia_same_store_sales and flower_child_sales are brand-level drivers (brands allowed), separate from company-wide same_store_sales per ontology R9.
All evidence_quote strings verified verbatim against the chunk's event content before writing this file.
